properties.name: spring.ai.anthropic.api-key
properties.description: Anthropic API access key.

properties.name: spring.ai.anthropic.base-url
properties.description: Anthropic API base URL.

properties.name: spring.ai.anthropic.beta-version
properties.description: Beta features version. Such as tools-2024-04-04 or max-tokens-3-5-sonnet-2024-07-15.

properties.name: spring.ai.anthropic.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Anthropic chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.anthropic.version
properties.description: Anthropic API version.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.api-key
properties.description: Azure OpenAI API key. From the Azure AI OpenAI `Keys and Endpoint` section under `Resource Management`.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.audio.transcription.enabled
properties.description: Enable AzureOpenAI audio transcription model.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Azure OpenAI chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Azure OpenAI embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.endpoint
properties.description: Azure OpenAI API endpoint. From the Azure AI OpenAI `Keys and Endpoint` section under `Resource Management`.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable Azure OpenAI chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.azure.openai.open-ai-api-key
properties.description: (non Azure) OpenAI API key. Used to authenticate with the OpenAI service, instead of Azure OpenAI. This automatically sets the endpoint to https://api.openai.com/v1.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Anthropic chat model. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link AnthropicChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic3.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Anthropic chat model. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.anthropic3.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link AnthropicChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.access-key
properties.description: AWS access key.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.region
properties.description: AWS region to use. Defaults to us-east-1.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.secret-key
properties.description: AWS secret key.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.session-token
properties.description: AWS session token. (optional) When provided the AwsSessionCredentials are used. Otherwise the AwsBasicCredentials are used.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.aws.timeout
properties.description: Set model timeout, Defaults 5 min.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Cohere Chat Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.chat.model
properties.description: Bedrock Cohere Chat generative name. Defaults to 'cohere-command-v14'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Cohere Embedding Model. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.cohere.embedding.model
properties.description: Bedrock Cohere Embedding generative name. Defaults to 'cohere.embed-multilingual-v3'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.converse.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Converse chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.jurassic2.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Ai21Jurassic2 chat model. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.jurassic2.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link Ai21Jurassic2ChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.llama.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Llama chat model. Disabled by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.llama.chat.model
properties.description: The generative id to use. See the {@link LlamaChatModel} for the supported models.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Titan Chat Client. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.chat.model
properties.description: Bedrock Titan Chat generative name. Defaults to 'amazon.titan-text-express-v1'.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Bedrock Titan Embedding Model. False by default.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.input-type
properties.description: Titan Embedding API input types. Could be either text or image (encoded in base64). Defaults to {@link InputType#IMAGE}.

properties.name: spring.ai.bedrock.titan.embedding.model
properties.description: Bedrock Titan Embedding generative name. Defaults to 'amazon.titan-embed-image-v1'.

properties.name: spring.ai.chat.client.enabled
properties.description: Enable chat client builder.

properties.name: spring.ai.chat.client.observations.include-input
properties.description: Whether to include the input content in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.chat.observations.include-completion
properties.description: Whether to include the completion content in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.chat.observations.include-error-logging
properties.description: Whether to include error logging in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.chat.observations.include-prompt
properties.description: Whether to include the prompt content in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.cache.directory
properties.description: Resource cache directory. Used to cache remote resources, such as the ONNX models, to the local file system. Applicable only for cache.enabled == true. Defaults to {java.io.tmpdir}/spring-ai-onnx-generative.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.cache.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Resource caching.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.enabled
properties.description: Enable the Transformer Embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.metadata-mode
properties.description: Specifies what parts of the {@link Document}'s content and metadata will be used for computing the embeddings. Applicable for the {@link TransformersEmbeddingModel#embed(Document)} method only. Has no effect on the {@link TransformersEmbeddingModel#embed(String)} or {@link TransformersEmbeddingModel#embed(List)}. Defaults to {@link MetadataMode#NONE}.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.gpu-device-id
properties.description: Run on a GPU or with another provider (optional). https://onnxruntime.ai/docs/get-started/with-java.html#run-on-a-gpu-or-with-another-provider-optional The GPU device ID to execute on. Only applicable if >= 0. Ignored otherwise.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.model-output-name
properties.description: Defaults to: 'last_hidden_state'.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.onnx.model-uri
properties.description: Existing, pre-trained ONNX generative. Commonly exported from https://sbert.net/docs/pretrained_models.html. Defaults to sentence-transformers/all-MiniLM-L6-v2.

properties.name: spring.ai.embedding.transformer.tokenizer.uri
properties.description: URI of a pre-trained HuggingFaceTokenizer created by the ONNX engine (e.g. tokenizer.json).

properties.name: spring.ai.huggingface.chat.api-key
properties.description: API Key to authenticate with the Inference Endpoint.

properties.name: spring.ai.huggingface.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Hugging Face chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.huggingface.chat.url
properties.description: URL of the Inference Endpoint.

properties.name: spring.ai.image.observations.include-prompt
properties.description: Whether to include the prompt content in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.minimax.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable MiniMax chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.minimax.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable MiniMax embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.mistralai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.mistralai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable MistralAI embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.moonshot.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Moonshot chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.base-url
properties.description: Base URL where Ollama API server is running.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Ollama chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Ollama embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.chat.additional-models
properties.description: Additional models to initialize besides the ones configured via default properties.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.chat.include
properties.description: Include this type of models in the initialization task.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.embedding.additional-models
properties.description: Additional models to initialize besides the ones configured via default properties.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.embedding.include
properties.description: Include this type of models in the initialization task.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.max-retries
properties.description: Maximum number of retries for the model pull operation.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.pull-model-strategy
properties.description: Whether to pull models at startup-time and how.

properties.name: spring.ai.ollama.init.timeout
properties.description: How long to wait for a model to be pulled.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.speech.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI audio speech model.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.audio.transcription.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI audio transcription model.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.openai.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable OpenAI image model.

properties.name: spring.ai.postgresml.embedding.create-extension
properties.description: Create the extensions required for embedding

properties.name: spring.ai.postgresml.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Postgres ML embedding model.

properties.name: spring.ai.qianfan.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable QianFan chat client.

properties.name: spring.ai.qianfan.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable QianFan embedding client.

properties.name: spring.ai.qianfan.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable QianFan image model.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.initial-interval
properties.description: Initial sleep duration.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.max-interval
properties.description: Maximum backoff duration.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.backoff.multiplier
properties.description: Backoff interval multiplier.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.exclude-on-http-codes
properties.description: List of HTTP status codes that should not trigger a retry (e.g. throw NonTransientAiException).

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.max-attempts
properties.description: Maximum number of retry attempts.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.on-client-errors
properties.description: If false, throw a NonTransientAiException, and do not attempt retry for 4xx client error codes. False by default. If true, throw a TransientAiException, and attempt retry for 4xx client.

properties.name: spring.ai.retry.on-http-codes
properties.description: List of HTTP status codes that should trigger a retry.

properties.name: spring.ai.stabilityai.image.enabled
properties.description: Enable Stability image model.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.azure.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.cassandra.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.chroma.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.cosmosdb.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.elasticsearch.dimensions
properties.description: The number of dimensions in the vector.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.elasticsearch.index-name
properties.description: The name of the index to store the vectors.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.elasticsearch.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.elasticsearch.similarity
properties.description: The similarity function to use.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.beam-width
properties.description: The beam width for similarity queries. Default value is {@code 100}. To specify a custom beam width, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.beam-width";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.buckets
properties.description: The number of buckets to use for partitioning the data. Default value is {@code 0}. To specify custom buckets, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.buckets";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.fields
properties.description: The fields to be used for queries. Default value is an array containing {@code "vector"}. To specify custom fields, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.fields"

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.host
properties.description: The host of the GemFire to connect to. To specify a custom host, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.host";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.index-name
properties.description: The name of the index in the GemFire. To specify a custom index, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.index-name";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.max-connections
properties.description: The maximum number of connections allowed. Default value is {@code 16}. To specify custom number of connections, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.max-connections";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.port
properties.description: The port of the GemFire to connect to. To specify a custom port, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.port";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.ssl-enabled
properties.description: Set to true if GemFire cluster is ssl enabled To specify sslEnabled, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.ssl-enabled";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.vector-similarity-function
properties.description: The similarity function to be used for vector comparisons. Default value is {@code "COSINE"}. To specify custom vectorSimilarityFunction, use "spring.ai.vectorstore.gemfire.vector-similarity-function";

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.ca-pem-path
properties.description: The ca.pem path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.client-key-path
properties.description: The client.key path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.client-pem-path
properties.description: The client.pem path for tls two-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.connect-timeout-ms
properties.description: Connection timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.host
properties.description: Milvus host name/address.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.idle-timeout-ms
properties.description: Idle timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be larger than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.keep-alive-time-ms
properties.description: Keep-alive time value of client channel. The keep-alive value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.keep-alive-timeout-ms
properties.description: The keep-alive timeout value of client channel. The timeout value must be greater than zero.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.password
properties.description: The password for this connection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.port
properties.description: Milvus the connection port. Value must be greater than zero and less than 65536.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.rpc-deadline-ms
properties.description: Deadline for how long you are willing to wait for a reply from the server. With a deadline setting, the client will wait when encounter fast RPC fail caused by network fluctuations. The deadline value must be larger than or equal to zero. Default value is 0, deadline is disabled.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.secure
properties.description: Secure the authorization for this connection, set to True to enable TLS.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.server-name
properties.description: Sets the target name override for SSL host name checking, only takes effect when "secure" is True. Note: this value is passed to grpc.ssl_target_name_override

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.server-pem-path
properties.description: server.pem path for tls one-way authentication, only takes effect when "secure" is True.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.token
properties.description: Token serving as the key for identification and authentication purposes.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.uri
properties.description: The uri of Milvus instance

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.client.username
properties.description: The username and password for this connection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.collection-name
properties.description: Milvus collection name to store the vectors.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.content-field-name
properties.description: The content field name for the collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.database-name
properties.description: The name of the Milvus database to connect to.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.embedding-dimension
properties.description: The dimension of the vectors to be stored in the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.embedding-field-name
properties.description: The embedding field name for the collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.id-field-name
properties.description: The ID field name for the collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.index-parameters
properties.description: The index parameters to be used for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.index-type
properties.description: The type of the index to be created for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.metadata-field-name
properties.description: The metadata field name for the collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.milvus.metric-type
properties.description: The metric type to be used for the Milvus collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.collection-name
properties.description: The name of the collection to store the vectors. Defaults to "vector_store".

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.index-name
properties.description: The name of the index to store the vectors. Defaults to "vector_index".

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.metadata-fields-to-filter
properties.description: Name of the metadata fields to use as filters.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.mongodb.path-name
properties.description: The name of the path to store the vectors. Defaults to "embedding".

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.neo4j.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.observations.include-query-response
properties.description: Whether to include the search response content in the observations.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.opensearch.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.opensearch.uris
properties.description: Comma-separated list of the OpenSearch instances to use.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.oracle.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.pgvector.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.api-key
properties.description: The API key to use for authentication with the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.collection-name
properties.description: The name of the collection to use in Qdrant.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.host
properties.description: The host of the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.port
properties.description: The port of the Qdrant server.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.qdrant.use-tls
properties.description: Whether to use TLS(HTTPS). Defaults to false.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.redis.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.typesense.client.api-key
properties.description: Typesense API key. This is the default api key when the user follows the Typesense quick start guide.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.typesense.collection-name
properties.description: Typesense collection name to store the vectors.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.typesense.embedding-dimension
properties.description: The dimension of the vectors to be stored in the Typesense collection.

properties.name: spring.ai.vectorstore.typesense.initialize-schema
properties.description: Vector stores do not initialize schema by default on application startup. The applications explicitly need to opt-in for initializing the schema on startup. The recommended way to initialize the schema on startup is to set the initialize-schema property on the vector store. See {@link #setInitializeSchema(boolean)}.

properties.description: spring.ai.vectorstore.weaviate.filter-field.<field-name>=<field-type>

properties.name: spring.ai.watsonx.ai.chat.enabled
properties.description: Enable Watsonx.AI chat model.

properties.name: spring.ai.watsonx.ai.embedding.enabled
properties.description: Enable Watsonx.ai embedding model.

properties.description: Enable ZhiPuAI chat model.
